source: Coverage map surfaces home.intake-upload, api.ontology-generate, service.file-extraction, provider.llm-ontology, data.project-persistence, and admin.project-list-delete-reset were assigned to this phase; implementation/runtime proof has not run.

Coverage map surfaces runtime.oasis-start, runtime.oasis-stop-close, data.run-state-progress, data.action-logs, data.posts-comments, provider.graph-memory-update, and ui.simulation-run were assigned to this phase; implementation/runtime proof has not run.

Coverage map surfaces ipc.interview-single, ipc.interview-batch-all, data.interview-history, ui.interaction-view, history.database, i18n.localization, security.public-local-posture, config.env-runtime, and deployment.local-docker were assigned to this phase; implementation/runtime proof has not run.
